$comment: PINNED brand spec for CasesDaily. Derived from Stage 0's bootstrap of the CasesDaily repo, then reviewed + pinned. Surfaces set light (operator preference + the dashboard/portal is light); orange primary kept from the real Tailwind config. Pass to the pipeline with --brand config/casesdaily-brand.json for deterministic Agent 3 output.
name: CasesDaily
voice: Professional, empathetic, conversion-focused. Plain and confident, no jargon.
componentStyle: Light surfaces, generous padding, one subtle shadow level. Orange (#f97316) reserved for primary actions only. Clean, modern dashboard styling — not dark.
